function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item and ran the six requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file while preserving the original note body text beneath the frontmatter. I then deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system tree, read relevant workflow/schema docs, read nested AGENTS.MD files in entered folders, preserved entire original record bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed six finance files for OCR workflow. Each listed file was read and contained all required visible fields/line items for the finance schema. I added required invoice/bill frontmatter fields per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md and kept original bodies intact per migration workflow, then removed the processed inbox file as required by process-next-inbox-item workflow and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD.
completed_steps_laconic: write updated frontmatter to six target finance files
